name: stockyard-promptguard
description: PII redaction and prompt injection detection for LLM APIs. Regex-based redaction with restore capability. Block or sanitize dangerous prompts.

tools.name: promptguard_stats
tools.description: Get guard statistics: total scanned, PII detections by type, injection blocks.

tools.name: promptguard_test
tools.description: Test a prompt against PII detection and injection rules without sending to LLM.

tools.name: promptguard_set_mode
tools.description: Change the guard mode: redact, redact-restore, or block.

tools.name: promptguard_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the PromptGuard proxy is running and healthy.
